'''toyashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbered|rubbered]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbered|rubbered]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| toyashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyashithi|toyashithi]] || [[word:toyashiji|toyashiji]] || [[word:toyashishi|toyashishi]] || [[word:toyashiki|toyashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyashuthuthu|toyashuthuthu]] || [[word:toyashujuju|toyashujuju]] || [[word:toyashushushu|toyashushushu]] || [[word:toyashukuku|toyashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyashuthu|toyashuthu]] || [[word:toyashuju|toyashuju]] || [[word:toyashushu|toyashushu]] || [[word:toyashuku|toyashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyashufthuf|toyashufthuf]] || [[word:toyashufjuf|toyashufjuf]] || [[word:toyashufshuf|toyashufshuf]] || [[word:toyashufkuf|toyashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyashethe|toyashethe]] || [[word:toyasheje|toyasheje]] || [[word:toyasheshe|toyasheshe]] || [[word:toyasheke|toyasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyashothotho|toyashothotho]] || [[word:toyashojojo|toyashojojo]] || [[word:toyashoshosho|toyashoshosho]] || [[word:toyashokoko|toyashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyashotho|toyashotho]] || [[word:toyashojo|toyashojo]] || [[word:toyashosho|toyashosho]] || [[word:toyashoko|toyashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyashofthof|toyashofthof]] || [[word:toyashofjof|toyashofjof]] || [[word:toyashofshof|toyashofshof]] || [[word:toyashofkof|toyashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfthĂŻf|toyashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfjĂŻf|toyashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfshĂŻf|toyashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfkĂŻf|toyashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|toyashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|toyashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|toyashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|toyashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfthĂŻf|toyashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfjĂŻf|toyashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfshĂŻf|toyashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfkĂŻf|toyashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfthĂŻf|toyashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfjĂŻf|toyashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfshĂŻf|toyashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:toyashĂŻfkĂŻf|toyashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyashĂŠthĂŠ|toyashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:toyashĂŠjĂŠ|toyashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:toyashĂŠshĂŠ|toyashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:toyashĂŠkĂŠ|toyashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyashathatha|toyashathatha]] || [[word:toyashajaja|toyashajaja]] || [[word:toyashashasha|toyashashasha]] || [[word:toyashakaka|toyashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyashatha|toyashatha]] || [[word:toyashaja|toyashaja]] || [[word:toyashasha|toyashasha]] || [[word:toyashaka|toyashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyashafthaf|toyashafthaf]] || [[word:toyashafjaf|toyashafjaf]] || [[word:toyashafshaf|toyashafshaf]] || [[word:toyashafkaf|toyashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:toyashasha|toyashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyashĂ«sha|toyashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyashrosha|toyashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyashmusha|toyashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyashyasha|toyashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyashnkshĂ«sha|gotoyashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyashnkrosha|gotoyashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyashnkmusha|gotoyashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyashnkyasha|gotoyashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:toyayashasha|toyayashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyayashĂ«sha|toyayashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyayashrosha|toyayashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyayashmusha|toyayashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyayashyasha|toyayashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyayashnkshĂ«sha|gotoyayashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyayashnkrosha|gotoyayashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyayashnkmusha|gotoyayashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyayashnkyasha|gotoyayashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:teyĂŠshasha|teyĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:teyĂŠshĂ«sha|teyĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:teyĂŠshrosha|teyĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:teyĂŠshmusha|teyĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:teyĂŠshyasha|teyĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goteyĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|goteyĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goteyĂŠshnkrosha|goteyĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goteyĂŠshnkmusha|goteyĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goteyĂŠshnkyasha|goteyĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:toyfashasha|toyfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyfashĂ«sha|toyfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyfashrosha|toyfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyfashmusha|toyfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyfashyasha|toyfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyfashnkshĂ«sha|gotoyfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyfashnkrosha|gotoyfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyfashnkmusha|gotoyfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyfashnkyasha|gotoyfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
